passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 71-80): The following are the criteria laid down by an organisation to select personnel in its Research Department: 1. The candidate must not be above 30 years of age as on 1st August, 1995. 2. The candidate must be an M.Sc. with at least 65% marks.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Ranjan Saharawat has an eyesight of +2.5 with no colour blindness. He has served as a Mechanical Engineer for five years. On 1st January, 1996, he was 71.1967.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Sunita Chabarria was born on 2.1.1965. He has an eyesight of +1.5 with no colour. He is a B.E. in Mechanical Engineering. He has a passport and has been working as Mechanical engineer for four years and has a passport.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Ranjan Srinivasan has the eyesight as required by the company. He was born on 25.01.1964. He is a B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering. He has a working experience of seven years as marine engineer. He has a passport and is yet to get it.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Mala Bhushan was born on 1st November, 1968. She is a Mechanical Engineer. She has an eyesight as within the limits stipulated by the company. She has working experience of 5 years as Mechanical Engineer. On 1st January, 1995, she was 25 years old.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Sudhir Kumar is a B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering. She has an experience of 28 months in the capacity of Mechanical Engineer. Before his eyesight is within the stipulated limits and has no colour blindness.
